doc_title: California State Bar Emergency Access to Justice Protocol 2025 (EAJP-2025)
label: fabricated
reason: The California State Bar has not authorized such a protocol, and the provisions regarding unsupervised motion drafting contradict current Business and Professions Code regulations.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: The California State Bar does not permit paralegals to draft and file motions without pre-filing attorney supervision, and no such "EAJP-2025" protocol exists in official 2024-2025 regulatory updates.
response_turn2:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: The California State Bar has not authorized such a protocol, and the provisions regarding unsupervised motion drafting contradict current Business and Professions Code regulations.
